title: Badger Meter Software Engineering Intern Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Badger Meter Software Engineering Intern interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your Los Gatos, CA internship.
content:
# Badger Meter Software Engineering Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Badger Meter Software Engineering Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Los Gatos, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Badger Meter
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Badger Meter is offering a Software Engineering Intern internship position in Los Gatos, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Badger Meter's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Badger Meter interview and increase your chances of success.
